groups.label: Species
groups.hint: Base species: sets the core look in every render, which feature groups apply, and the suggested surface.

groups.label: Second Heritage
groups.hint: A second heritage blended into the prompt. Surface and features stay your choice.

groups.label: Gender Presentation
groups.hint: Sets how renders are framed (feminine / masculine / androgynous subject). Identity and pronouns are chat-side only.

groups.label: Identity
groups.hint: Chat-side only - never affects images.

groups.label: Pronouns
groups.hint: Chat-side only - never affects images.

groups.label: Apparent Age
groups.hint: Drives the visible age in every image. The Age number is the hard adult anchor and library display; this band is what actually renders.

groups.label: True Age Is…
groups.hint: Chat-side lore (how old they really are). Never rendered.

groups.label: Class
groups.hint: Narrative class flavor, grouped by genre. Chat-side only - the rendered look comes from Wardrobe and Accessories; the day job lives in Occupation.

groups.label: Surface
groups.hint: What covers the body. Gates Skin Tone (skin-bearing surfaces only) and reveals the matching fur / scale / feather / chassis / ethereal groups.

groups.label: Skin Tone
groups.hint: Color of the body's surface. The label follows the Surface pick - skin tone on skin, fur tone on full fur, scale tone on full scales, and so on.

groups.label: Hair Color
groups.hint: Primary hair color in every render.

groups.label: Second Hair Color
groups.hint: Pick a second color to make the hair two-tone - the Pattern choice appears once set.

groups.label: Hair Length
groups.hint: How much hair there is. Bald removes the style and color choices entirely.

groups.label: Hair Style
groups.hint: The cut and arrangement - length is set separately above. Styles are grouped by family; search or expand a group.

groups.label: Bangs
groups.hint: Front fringe framing the face.

groups.label: Facial Hair
groups.hint: Renders regardless of gender presentation.

groups.label: Eye Color
groups.hint: Primary eye color in every render.

groups.label: Heterochromia
groups.hint: Pick a second color for heterochromia (one eye each).

groups.label: Eye Shape
groups.hint: Eye silhouette - a subtle face modifier.

groups.label: Eye Features
groups.hint: Stackable eye details (glow, slit pupils, lashes...).

groups.label: Face Shape
groups.hint: Late-window detail - renders when the prompt has room.

groups.label: Lips
groups.hint: Late-window detail - renders when the prompt has room.

groups.label: Nose
groups.hint: Late-window detail - renders when the prompt has room.

groups.label: Eyebrows
groups.hint: Late-window detail - renders when the prompt has room.

groups.label: Makeup
groups.hint: Applied look - part of the character, not the scene.

groups.label: Silhouette
groups.hint: Overall silhouette - the main body descriptor in every render.

groups.label: Height
groups.hint: Species-relative height (a tall dwarf is tall for a dwarf).

groups.label: Muscle
groups.hint: Visible muscle definition on top of the silhouette.

groups.label: Ears
groups.hint: Renders for any race - mix freely.

groups.label: Horns
groups.hint: Renders for any race - mix freely.

groups.label: Tail
groups.hint: Renders for any race - mix freely.

groups.label: Wings
groups.hint: Renders for any race - mix freely.

groups.label: Chassis Seams
groups.hint: Construct body structure - joint lines and plating.

groups.label: Face
groups.hint: Construct face treatment.

groups.label: Other Features
groups.hint: Stackable extras (halo, third eye, gills...).

groups.label: Distinctive Marks
groups.hint: Stackable distinctive marks, grouped by kind. Every surface's options are always available - mix freely.

groups.label: Chest
groups.hint: Categorical by design - the pipeline honors categories, not measurements.

groups.label: Waist
groups.hint: Categorical by design.

groups.label: Hips
groups.hint: Categorical by design.

groups.label: Rear
groups.hint: Categorical by design.

groups.label: Body Hair
groups.hint: Categorical by design.

groups.label: Personality Archetype
groups.hint: Who they are at the core - the one-line personality read. Chat-side: shapes how they talk and act, never how they look.

options.label: Refers to self in third person

groups.label: Wardrobe
groups.hint: Stackable wardrobe pieces, grouped by style family. Search or expand a family.

groups.label: Accessories
groups.hint: Stackable accessories, grouped by kind. Search or expand a group.

options.label: Keeping a promise to the dead
Fresh start in a new town
Pet names for anyone they like

groups.label: Configuration
groups.hint: An explicit, independent choice - never derived from race or presentation. Configure it or leave Unspecified.

groups.label: Grooming
groups.hint: Grooming state for intimate renders.
